items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of setting different pricing per location.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of setting different pricing per location, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the actual pricing mechanisms in place for different locations. While the use case mentions a 10% higher price downtown, there are no concrete API reads or validations that demonstrate how this pricing is applied or confirmed during the booking process. This indicates a gap in the evidence related to the specific requirement being tested.
